assertions.title: Heatmap renders from Schema 4D grid data (2D grid, 7x7, cell count = 49)

steps.observed: Heatmap tab active, content panel switched
Plotly heatmap rendered with 7x7 grid, uniform teal color (all values 5247.0), 49 total cells confirmed via JS eval
No console errors

assertions.title: Current lock marker visible on heatmap at position x=1.5, y=0.6

steps.observed: White circle/ring marker visible at position x=1.5, y=0.6 on the heatmap, visually distinct from regular cells
JS eval confirmed current_lock: {x:1.5, y:0.6, metric_value:5247}

assertions.title: Axis labels show param names (ltf.atr_multiplier, ltf.body_ratio) and values

steps.observed: X-axis label shows 'ltf.atr_multiplier' with tick marks at 1, 1.25, 1.5, 1.75, 2, 2.5, 3
Y-axis label shows 'ltf.body_ratio' with tick marks at 0.5, 0.55, 0.6, 0.65, 0.7, 0.75, 0.8
Confirmed: xAxisParam='ltf.atr_multiplier', yAxisParam='ltf.body_ratio', xValues=[1,1.25,1.5,1.75,2,2.5,3], yValues=[0.5,0.55,0.6,0.65,0.7,0.75,0.8]

assertions.title: Cell hover shows metric value and param values in tooltip

steps.expected: Tooltip with metric value and param values
steps.observed: Tooltip displayed showing 'detection count: 5247', 'ltf.atr_multiplier: 1.5', 'ltf.body_ratio: 0.7'

assertions.title: Color scale visible and appropriate for dark theme

steps.expected: Visible color scale with metric range mapping
steps.observed: Color scale legend visible on right side showing 'detection count' label with gradient from blue to teal to yellow. Colors distinguishable on dark background (#0a0e17).

assertions.title: Heatmap title shows primitive name (displacement) and metric (detection_count)

steps.observed: Title displays 'Displacement — detection count' with subtitle 'Parameter Heatmap'

assertions.title: 1D degenerate grid renders as line chart
assertions.issues: No 1D sweep fixture available — current data is 2D grid (7x7). The code may handle 1D correctly but cannot be verified without 1D test data where axes.y.param === '_single'.

assertions.title: 1D line chart shows param values on x-axis
assertions.issues: No 1D sweep fixture available — current data is 2D grid (7x7). Cannot verify 1D line chart rendering without 1D test data.

assertions.title: Data loads from separate sweep JSON file (sweep_displacement_ltf_atr_multiplier.json)

steps.action: Verify sweep data loaded via JS eval
steps.observed: app.sweepData confirmed loaded: sweepDataLoaded=true, primitive='displacement', metric='detection_count', gridDimensions='7x7'

steps.action: Verify data source is separate file
steps.observed: Data loaded from separate JSON file (not embedded in Schema 4A evaluation_run.json)

assertions.title: Plateau region handled correctly (plateau is null — should be no outline, no error)

steps.action: Verify plateau value via JS eval
steps.observed: app.sweepData.plateau confirmed as null
No outline visible on heatmap, no console errors. Null plateau handled gracefully.
No console errors

assertions.title: Null grid cells handled gracefully (check if any null cells exist; if no nulls, verify no error)

steps.action: Check for null cells via JS eval
steps.expected: Count null cells, verify no errors
steps.observed: JS eval confirmed: hasNullCells=false, nullCount=0, totalCells=49. All 49 cells have value 5247.0.
No console errors. Grid renders correctly with no null cell handling issues.

assertions.title: Line chart renders train and test metrics across 9 windows

steps.expected: Walk-Forward tab active with line chart
steps.observed: Walk-Forward tab active, line chart rendered with two lines across 9 windows

steps.action: Verify window count via JS eval
steps.observed: app.walkForwardData.windows.length = 9
Two lines visible: Test Metric (green/teal dashed with markers) and Train Metric (blue solid). 9 data points per line.

assertions.title: Train and test lines visually distinct (different colors/dash styles, legend)

steps.expected: Different colors and/or dash styles with legend
steps.observed: Test Metric: green/teal dashed line with circular markers. Train Metric: blue solid line with square markers. Legend in top-left identifies both lines clearly.

assertions.title: Shaded delta bands between train and test lines

steps.action: Inspect area between train and test lines
steps.observed: Shaded band visible between train and test lines. Band is semi-transparent and does not obscure the lines. Particularly visible in the window 3 area where delta is largest.

assertions.title: Pass/fail per window visually indicated (green for 8 passed, red for 1 failed)

steps.action: Inspect window markers for color coding
steps.expected: Green for passed, red for failed at index 3
steps.observed: Test metric data points use green/teal for 8 passed windows. Window 3 (failed, test_metric=0.42) shows red marker and red background shading in its column. Failed window immediately identifiable.

assertions.title: Summary verdict badge shows 'CONDITIONALLY_STABLE' with amber color

steps.observed: Badge in top-right displays 'CONDITIONALLY STABLE' with amber/yellow background. Clearly visible without scrolling.

steps.action: Verify verdict data via JS eval
steps.observed: app.walkForwardData.summary.verdict = 'CONDITIONALLY_STABLE'

assertions.title: Summary stats displayed (windows_total=9, passed=8, failed=1, mean_test_metric=0.631, etc.)

steps.observed: Stats bar shows: WINDOWS: 9, PASSED: 8, FAILED: 1, MEAN TEST: 0.631, STD TEST: 0.087, MEAN Δ: -0.049, THRESHOLD: 15%. All values match expected data.
Confirmed: windows_total=9, windows_passed=8, windows_failed=1, mean_test_metric=0.631, std_test_metric=0.087, pass_threshold_pct=15

assertions.title: Window details on hover/click (train/test periods, delta, regime_tags)

steps.action: Hover over window 0 test metric data point
steps.expected: Detail panel with train/test periods, delta, regime_tags
steps.observed: Plotly tooltip shows: 'Window 0 — Test, Value: 0.7100, Δ: -0.0300 (-4.1%), Status: ✓ PASS, Period: 2024-04-01 → 2024-04-30, Regime: trending, normal_vol'. Detail panel on right shows: Window 0 ✓ PASS, Train Period: 2024-01-01 → 2024-03-31, Test Period: 2024-04-01 → 2024-04-30, Train Metric: 0.7400, Test Metric: 0.7100, Delta: -0.0300, Delta %: -4.1%, Regime Tags: trending, normal_vol.

assertions.title: Pass threshold shown on chart (15%)

steps.observed: Red dashed horizontal line visible across chart labeled 'threshold (-15%)'. Line is at the level corresponding to 15% below the mean test metric. Pass threshold clearly labeled.

assertions.title: Data loads from walk-forward JSON file (walk_forward_displacement.json)

steps.action: Verify walk-forward data loaded via JS eval
steps.observed: app.walkForwardData confirmed loaded: wfDataLoaded=true, 9 windows, verdict='CONDITIONALLY_STABLE'
All fields match walk_forward_displacement.json: windows_total=9, passed=8, failed=1, degradation_flag=true, worst_window.window_index=3

assertions.title: Worst window highlighted (index 3)

steps.expected: Visually emphasized distinct from standard pass/fail coloring
steps.observed: Window 3 (worst window) has special annotation: '⚠ Worst' label, dashed red circle around the data point, red background column shading. Clearly distinguishable from other windows.
app.walkForwardData.summary.worst_window.window_index = 3, test_metric = 0.42

assertions.title: Degradation flag displayed (degradation_flag = true, should show warning)

steps.observed: Amber badge '⚠ Degradation Detected' displayed prominently in top-right area next to verdict badge. Warning clearly visible.
app.walkForwardData.summary.degradation_flag = true

blockers.description: VAL-HEAT-007 and VAL-HEAT-008 require 1D degenerate grid data (axes.y.param === '_single') but current fixture has 2D data (7×7 grid). Cannot test 1D line chart rendering.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked sweep JSON — confirmed axes.y.param='ltf.body_ratio' (2D). No 1D fixture available.

summary: Tested 22 assertions: 20 passed, 0 failed, 2 blocked (VAL-HEAT-007, VAL-HEAT-008: no 1D sweep fixture available). All heatmap features verified: 7x7 grid renders correctly, lock marker at x=1.5 y=0.6, axis labels with param names, hover tooltip with metric+param values, color scale on dark theme, title shows primitive+metric, plateau=null handled gracefully, no null cells. All walk-forward features verified: line chart with 9 windows, distinct train/test lines, delta bands, pass/fail color coding, CONDITIONALLY_STABLE verdict badge, summary stats match expected values, hover detail panel with full window info, 15% threshold line, worst window (index 3) highlighted, degradation warning displayed. Zero console errors throughout.
